title: Compass Minerals Reports Fiscal 2026 Second-Quarter Results
description: OVERLAND PARK, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Compass Minerals (NYSE: CMP), a leading global provider of essential minerals, today reported fiscal 2026 second-quarter results. The company also announced that unionized employees at its Goderich mine have ratified a new three-year collective bargaining agreement. title: ‘Fantastic Four: First Steps’ Director Tackling New ‘Planet of the Apes’ Movie
description: 20th Century Studios is returning to Planet of the Apes. Matt Shakman, who directed Marvel Studios’ The Fantastic Four: First Steps, has been tapped to helm a new installment of the long-running sci-fi property, The Hollywood Reporter has confirmed. Ukrainian General Staff strengthens officer training, implements NATO standards
description: The General Staff of the Armed Forces of Ukraine continues systematic efforts to improve officer training and digitize the educational process, including with the involvement of foreign instructors and the implementation of NATO standards.

title: GOP Contest between candidates plays out at party event
description: MACKINAW CITY — While Michigan Republicans from the Straits area enjoyed a packed house at their annual Lincoln Day dinner event last Friday, the competition between candidates was apparent.

title: Man accused of rape, locking woman in shed for days
description: A court has heard explosive claims a woman tried to bite her alleged attacker’s genitals to stop an attempted oral rape in a Bundaberg shed.
